news.headline: Hindu Advocacy Day on Capitol Hill highlights targeting of Hindu students and temples; calls for recognition of Hinduphobia like through H.Res 1131.
news.summary: During the 3rd National Hindu Advocacy Day on the Hill in Washington on June 28, 2024, a diverse group including lawmakers, Hindu students, researchers, and community leaders gathered in a crowded room. The main focus was on the pressing need for formal recognition of Hinduphobia. The event highlighted the importance of initiatives such as H.Res 1131. It emphasized the significance of addressing issues related to discrimination and prejudice against Hindus. The event attracted a significant turnout, with key individuals advocating for greater awareness and action regarding this important matter.

news.headline: Community Solutions responds to Supreme Court ruling allowing cities to criminalize homelessness, CEO Rosanne Haggerty issues statement.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, Rosanne Haggerty, the President and CEO of Community Solutions, a prominent non-profit addressing homelessness, reacted to the U.S. Supreme Court's verdict supporting the City of...

news.headline: Investing $1000 in Cintas a decade ago could have grown significantly. Founded in 1968, Cintas provides specialized services globally.
news.summary: The article discusses the importance of tracking stock price changes over time for investors, as well as the influence of FOMO on stock investing, particularly with tech giants and popular consumer-facing stocks. It then poses the question of how much an investment in Cintas (NASDAQ: CTAS) would be worth today if made ten years ago. Cintas, founded in 1968, provides specialized services to businesses across North America, Europe, Asia, and Latin America. The company offers corporate identity uniform programs, entrance mats, restroom supplies, promotional products, and safety products. For further details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Aramco buys 10% stake in HORSE Powertrain Limited formed by Renault Group and Geely.
news.summary: Aramco has announced plans to purchase a 10% ownership stake in HORSE Powertrain Limited. This company was recently formed through a collaboration between Renault Group and Geely, focusing on providing global powertrain solutions. This strategic move by Aramco highlights their interest in the automotive sector and signifies a significant investment given the high-profile nature of the companies involved. The deal is set to enhance HORSE Powertrain Limited's position in the market and facilitate future innovations in powertrain technology.

news.headline: Mortgage applications in Hong Kong fell by 16.1% in May 2024, but approved loans rose by 8.8%, per HKMA.
news.summary: In May 2024, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority witnessed a significant drop of 16.1% in mortgage applications, yet there was a noteworthy 8.8% boost in approved mortgage loans during the same period.

news.headline: Pierre Fabre Labs receives European marketing approval for OBGEMSA™ (vibegron) for overactive bladder in adults.
news.summary: In CASTRES, France, on June 28, 2024, the European Commission gave the green light for Pierre Fabre Laboratories to market OBGEMSA™ (vibegron) for treating overactive bladder syndrome in adults. This condition is known to impact 70 or more individuals, causing significant distress.

news.headline: C40 Food Systems wins $2 million award for shifting millions of meals to be healthier and sustainable in major cities.
news.summary: The prestigious Food Planet Prize, the world's largest environmental award, was presented to C40 Food Systems, a leading global network, by the Curt Bergfors Foundation on June 28, 2024, in Stockholm, Sweden. This significant achievement showcases their outstanding contributions in sustainability and food systems.

news.headline: QIAGEN supports AAP guidelines recommending QFT-Plus test for TB screening in all children; 13 million Americans may have latent TB.
news.summary: QIAGEN N.V. praises new US guidelines advocating for screening at-risk children for latent tuberculosis with QuantiFERON-TB Gold Plus. American Academy of Pediatrics' updated guidelines cover children of all ages, including infants. TB cases have surged post-COVID-19, with an estimated 13 million latent TB infections in the US. Children are at risk for progression to active TB. IGRAs are preferred over tuberculin skin tests. QIAGEN aims for QFT-Plus to be the gold standard for blood-based TB detection.

news.headline: New legislation protects voting rights for all citizens, with a $1 billion capital injection to improve election security.
India B2C E-Commerce sector booming with market size reaching billions; Real-time Payment Transactions forecasted to hit 235 billion by 2027 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: A report titled "India B2C E-Commerce Insights, Payment Trends, & Emerging Digital Technologies 2024" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. India's B2C E-Commerce industry experienced significant growth, with market size hitting tens of billions of euros in FY 2023. By 2027, the market is forecasted to more than double, displaying a strong annual growth rate. The momentum is anticipated to persist, with Gross Merchandise Value (GMV) expected to surpass EUR 300 billion.

news.headline: Nasdaq halts Canna-Global Acquisition Corp trading at prices $10.45 (CNGL), $10.99 (CNGLU), and $0.0105 (CNGLW).
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, the Nasdaq Stock Market® (Nasdaq: NDAQ) revealed that the trading halt status of Canna-Global Acquisition Corp (Nasdaq: CNGL, CNGLU, and CNGLW) had been altered to "additional information requested" by the company. Trading for the company's stock was suspended on June 27, 2024, at 16:45:36 Eastern Time due to "news dissemination." The last sale prices were $10.45 (Nasdaq: CNGL), $10.99 (Nasdaq: CNGLU), and $0.0105 (Nasdaq: CNGLW).

news.headline: U.S. manufacturing sector shows signs of recovery with durable goods orders rising by 0.1% in May, inflation cooling.
news.summary: The U.S. manufacturing sector is seeing signs of recovery as inflation eases and demand rebounds. In May, orders for durable goods rose by 0.1%, surpassing the consensus estimate of a 0.1% decline. This follows a previous increase in April. Additionally, manufacturing output increased by 0.9% in May. However, inflation remains a threat, with the consumer price index rising 3.3% year over year in May, lower than expected. Despite this, inflation is gradually easing after a spike in the first quarter. Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell commented on the positive trends.

news.headline: European chipmakers face risk of losing market share in China, according to EU warning.
Bluejay Diagnostics closes $8.75M public offering with 5,368,098 common units and prefunded units at $1.63 per unit.
news.summary: Bluejay Diagnostics, Inc. closed a public offering with gross proceeds of approximately $8.75 million. The offering included 5,368,098 Common Units or Prefunded Units, each priced at $1.63 or $1.6299 respectively. Each Unit included Common Stock or a Prefunded Warrant, Class C warrants, and a Class D Warrant. The Prefunded Warrants are immediately exercisable. The Company aims to develop rapid diagnostics on its Symphony platform to enhance patient outcomes in critical care settings.

news.headline: Nipocalimab Phase 3 trial shows longest disease control for myasthenia gravis patients, superior ADL improvement over placebo.
news.summary: In a groundbreaking development, Johnson & Johnson unveiled the first and only FcRn blocker that has proven to be more effective in enhancing the activities of daily living (MG-ADLa) compared to a placebo. This was observed over a period of 24 weeks when administered alongside standard care for patients testing positive for antibodies such as anti-AChR+, anti-MuSK+, and anti-LRP4+. The announcement was made in Helsinki on June 28, 2024. The pharmaceutical giant, listed on the NYSE as JNJ, has marked a significant milestone in improving the quality of life for individuals battling these specific antibodies.

news.headline: Core Foundation launches world's first yield-bearing CORE ETP in Sweden on Spotlight Stock Exchange, offering exposure to Core blockchain's native token. Valour, a subsidiary of DeFi Technologies, spearheading initiative. Core features unique Satoshi Plus consensus mechanism. Valour had previously launched Bitcoin Staking ETP powered by Core's Non-Custodial Bitcoin Staking mechanism. Rich Rines emphasizes importance of making CORE token accessible to broader audience.
news.summary: The Core Foundation has revealed plans to launch the world's first yield-bearing CORE ETP on the Spotlight Stock Exchange. This initiative, led by Valour, a DeFi Technologies subsidiary, aims to provide investors with exposure to Core blockchain's native token. Core features the innovative Satoshi Plus consensus mechanism, combining Bitcoin Mining Hash Power, Delegated Proof of Stake, and Bitcoin Staking for network security. The Valour CORE ETP launch follows the successful introduction of the Bitcoin Staking ETP, the initial yield-bearing Bitcoin ETP driven by Core's Non-Custodial Bitcoin Staking mechanism. Rich Rines, a key contributor to Core, highlighted the importance of expanding access to the CORE token to a wider audience.

news.headline: Vaisala Corp announces share repurchase on 28.6.2024.
IPC repurchased 109,280 common shares under the NCIB from June 24 to 28, 2024, according to International Petroleum Corporation.
news.summary: International Petroleum Corporation (IPC), trading under the tickers TSX and Nasdaq Stockholm as IPCO, has recently disclosed their repurchase of 109,280 common shares (ISIN: CA46016U1084) between June 24 and 28, 2024. This transaction was made within IPC’s standard issuer bid/share repurchase program (NCIB).

news.headline: Dianthus Therapeutics presents DNTH103 at EAN Congress, Jun 29-July 2, 2024 in Helsinki. (Nasdaq: DNTH), 2 posters showcased.
news.summary: Dianthus Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: DNTH), a biotech company in New York and Waltham, Mass., revealed today that they will showcase two poster presentations for their DNTH103 drug at the upcoming 10th Congress of the European Academy of Neurology in Helsinki from June 29 to July 2, 2024. The company, focused on advancing innovative antibody complement therapeutics for severe autoimmune conditions, aims to present their findings on DNTH103 at the event.

news.headline: IPC repurchased 109,280 common shares under NCIB. Share updates announced by International Petroleum Corporation.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, International Petroleum Corporation (IPC) disclosed the repurchase of 109,280 IPC common shares (ISIN: CA46016U1084) from June 24 to 28, 2024. The shares were bought under IPC’s normal course issuer bid/share repurchase program (NCIB). IPC's shares trade on TSX and Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker symbol IPCO.

news.headline: Join Mohawk Industries, Inc. Q2 2024 earnings call on July 26 at 11:00 am ET after release on July 25.
news.summary: Join us for the live broadcast of the conference call hosted by Mohawk Industries, Inc. (NYSE: MHK) in conjunction with their Second Quarter 2024 earnings release. The call will take place on Friday, July 26, 2024, at 11:00 am ET. Mark your calendars for this important event.

news.headline: Learning Pool wins two awards for innovation: AI skills development platform recognized by eLearning Industry and Stevie American Business Awards.
news.summary: An enterprise platform has been acknowledged by eLearning Industry and the Stevie American Business Awards for its advanced AI-powered features in skills development, automation, and analytics. The platform, provided by Learning Pool, a prominent learning technology company, has gained recognition for its innovative capabilities. The announcement was made in New York and Derry, Northern Ireland on June 28, 2024.

news.headline: Stick vacuum cleaner market to grow by $3.67B from 2024-2028, 4.6% CAGR; Smart cities boost growth - Technavio.
news.summary: According to a recent report by Technavio, the worldwide stick vacuum cleaner market is projected to increase by USD 3.67 billion between 2024 and 2028, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.6% during this period. The rise in the number of smart cities is identified as a key factor propelling this growth.

news.headline: Tel-Instrument Electronics Corp. reported $342K net income on $8.8 million revenues for FY 2024, marking a 2% increase in revenue from the previous year.
news.summary: Tel-Instrument Electronics Corp. announced its financial results for the 2024 fiscal year, reporting a net income of $342,000 on revenues amounting to $8.8 million. This marks a $178,000 increase in revenue compared to the previous fiscal year. The company achieved a gross margin of 46.6% during this period. Tel-Instrument is a prominent provider of avionics test and measurement solutions, showcasing steady growth and profitability in the aviation industry.

news.headline: Bitcoin whale holding $61M wakes up, transfers 1,000 BTC to Coinbase, set to make 817% profit upon sale.
news.summary: A previously inactive Bitcoin investor would make an impressive 817% profit by selling their holdings, following the transfer of 1,000 BTC to the cryptocurrency exchange Coinbase.

news.headline: Blockchain and cryptocurrencies are revolutionizing travel industry, improving data security and potentially reducing prices. U.S. DOT to review airline privacy practices after breaches affecting 350M customers.
news.summary: Web3 technology, specifically blockchain and cryptocurrencies, is revolutionizing the travel industry by introducing changes in booking, payment methods, security measures, and potentially reducing prices. Camino Network and Travala.com are driving advancements in this space while considering regulatory uncertainties. The US DOT's privacy review on airlines' data security practices, announced on March 21, 2024, reflects the industry's existing vulnerabilities. The review aims to assess airlines' safeguarding methods for customers' personal data and examine potential unfair data monetization practices. Previous investigations have found high-risk practices by travel firms like Marriott, British Airways, and easyJet, affecting millions of customers, resulting in significant fines from regulators. Blockchain technology presents an opportunity to enhance data security and reshape traditional travel industry practices.

news.headline: Kraken co-founder Jesse Powell donates $1M in Ethereum to Donald Trump's presidential campaign, endorses him as pro-crypto candidate.
news.summary: Kraken founder Jesse Powell has donated $1 million to Donald Trump's presidential campaign, primarily in Ethereum. Powell shared his support on his X account, expressing his enthusiasm in backing the sole pro-crypto major party candidate for the 2024 Presidential election. Trump, known for his crypto-friendly stance, has begun accepting cryptocurrency contributions. He has voiced support for the crypto community and its future, aligning with other leaders in the industry.

news.headline: Ironclad appoints former Qualtrics executive as CPO, forms alliance with KPMG Law, fueling growth internationally.
news.summary: Ironclad's enterprise sector is experiencing notable growth, serving as the company's fastest-expanding segment. The company's upwards momentum in the international and upmarket sectors is being fueled by strategic executive appointments and new partnerships. In San Francisco on June 28, 2024, Ironclad, the top digital contracting platform for contemporary businesses, revealed these developments.

news.headline: US produced 13.25 mln bpd of crude oil in April, hitting highest level since Dec 2023 - EIA data.

APAC Data Center Construction Market to reach $35.09 billion by 2029 with substantial investments exceeding $10 billion from key players like Airtrunk, NTT DATA, AWS, Equinix, GDS Services, and Keppel Data Centers.
news.summary: The APAC Data Center Construction Market shows promising growth potential, as per a recent report. Valued at USD 19.51 billion in 2023, it is projected to reach USD 35.09 billion by 2029, with a remarkable CAGR of 10.28%. Factors contributing to this growth include strong government backing for data center development and rapid technological advancements in the region.

news.headline: Crypto VC predicts Bitcoin reaching $100K and Ethereum hitting $7K by November election. Bearish sentiment presents buying opportunity. Ethereum ETF concerns despite positive market trends for outperformance. Bullish on crypto.
news.summary: Quinn Thompson from Lekker Capital is optimistic about cryptocurrency markets surging before the U.S. presidential election in November. Despite prevailing bearish sentiment, he views the current market conditions as a great buying opportunity. Thompson noted a shift towards negativity in the market, particularly around the Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) ETF, despite positive signs suggesting its potential for outperformance. He mentioned the contrast from the bullish sentiment earlier in the year and commented on the scepticism surrounding the Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) ETF launch, which led to a drop in its value. Thompson believes that by the election, crypto markets could see significant growth.

news.headline: Debevoise & Plimpton responds to Kim Kardashian's motion to dismiss regarding Judd Foundation, Kardashian broadcast fake Donald Judd furniture.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, a statement from Megan Bannigan of Debevoise & Plimpton, representing Judd Foundation, addressed Kim Kardashian's motion to dismiss. Kardashian is accused of promoting counterfeit Donald Judd furniture without denying the allegation.

news.headline: Dow Jones falls after housing data; Rivian surges 30% on $5B Volkswagen investment, turning it into Tesla rival.
news.summary: The Dow Jones experienced a decline today following the release of crucial housing data. Meanwhile, Rivian saw a remarkable 30% increase in its stock value after receiving a substantial $5 billion investment from Volkswagen. This surge in Rivian's shares comes as a promising development for the electric vehicle company, positioning it as a strong competitor to Tesla.

news.headline: Global industrial filter market to reach $6.12B by 2031, CAGR of 6.5%, from current $3.94B in 2024. - Coherent Market Insights
news.summary: In Burlingame, California, on June 28, 2024, it was reported that the Industrial Filter Market has a current value of $3.94 billion. Forecasts suggest that this market is set to increase significantly, reaching $6.12 billion by 2031. This growth represents a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 6.5%.

news.headline: Doomlings unveils 'Imaginary Ends,' a variety expansion with 5 sets in one box, enhancing flagship game.
news.summary: On June 28, 2024, in Los Angeles, Doomlings unveiled 'Imaginary Ends,' a comprehensive Variety Expansion for its main game. Bringing together five interconnected expansion sets in a single package, the expansion, called Magical Merchants, introduces fresh elements to the game. This announcement marks a significant development for Doomlings and is poised to enhance the gaming experience for players.

news.headline: Gasoline demand in US dropped to 8.83M bpd in April, hitting its lowest point since February - EIA data.
Keysight partners with SGS to test Skylo NTN devices, using RF/RRM Carrier Acceptance Toolset. Enables secure connectivity.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has revealed that its RF/RRM Carrier Acceptance Toolset (RCAT) has empowered SGS to oversee the Skylo Technologies non-terrestrial network (NTN) device certification initiative. This move aims to enhance secure and dependable connectivity over a vast area. Furthermore, mobile operators are looking into implementing the hybrid satellite-terrestrial network structure of NTN to expand coverage. This advancement is crucial for chipset and device manufacturers.

news.headline: Oil and petroleum demand in US surged to 20 million bpd in April, marking highest level since December 2023 - EIA.
Investors face uncertainty post-debate. PCE data: Headline 0.0%, Core 0.1%. Personal spending 0.2%, income 0.5%. Key stocks highlighted.
news.summary: The article discusses the current state of the stock market and recent economic data, focusing on the PCE (Personal Consumption Expenditures) data and personal income/spending figures. The stock market is approaching a new high but faces challenges as it is above the support zone with low volume. The PCE data showed headline PCE at 0.0% (as expected) and core PCE at 0.1%, both in line with consensus. However, personal spending dropped to 0.2% and personal income rose to 0.5%, slightly above consensus. The article emphasizes the need for prudent investing amidst uncertainty caused by the recent presidential debate and advises investors to wait for clarity before making portfolio changes. It also suggests potential winners post-debate including the Magnificent Seven stocks, other mega-cap stocks, and fossil fuel energy stocks.

news.headline: S&P Global appoints Martina Cheung as new CEO, succeeding Douglas Peterson, effective Nov 1, 2024. Cheung has been with the company for 14 years and currently heads S&P Global Ratings, generating $3.3 billion in revenue in 2023. Peterson to remain on board until May 2025 and serve as special advisor until Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary: S&P Global Inc. (NYSE:SPGI) announced today that Martina L. Cheung, the current President of S&P Global Ratings, will take over as President and CEO, succeeding Douglas L. Peterson, starting November 1, 2024. Cheung will officially join the Board on July 1, 2024, while Peterson will continue as a Board member until May 2025. Additionally, he will act as a special advisor until December 31, 2025. With 14 years of experience at S&P Global, Cheung currently oversees S&P Global Ratings, which recorded $3.3 billion in revenue in 2023, marking a 9% growth from the previous year. The sector also maintained a solid 56.5% operating profit margin. Furthermore, under Cheung’s guidance, S&P Global Sustainable achieved an impressive 24% revenue increase in 2023. For more details on this news, the complete story can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Matrixport introduces its initial private strategy trading contest, providing rewards and benefits to participants. (Details inside)
news.summary: Matrixport has recently kicked off its first-ever private strategy trading competition. The competition is open to participants seeking rewards and exclusive privileges. This event aims to attract traders with varied levels of expertise, with a focus on cultivating a competitive trading environment. Participants will have the opportunity to showcase their skills and potentially earn significant rewards. The competition is set to involve a notable number of traders, with a diverse range of strategies expected to be employed. This initiative by Matrixport is geared towards fostering a dynamic trading community while offering attractive incentives for participants.

news.headline: AI revolution impacting industries, especially creative sector; Scope AI Corp's commentary June 28, 2024.
news.summary: A recent commentary by USA News Group on behalf of Scope AI Corp highlighted the impact of the artificial intelligence (AI) revolution in various industries. Released on June 28, 2024, in Vancouver, BC, the piece discusses the significant changes brought about by AI. The article emphasizes the emergence of new tools and technologies in creative sectors due to AI, resulting in a transformation of job roles and processes. This shift signifies a notable progression within numerous industries as they adapt to the advancements of AI.

news.headline: Gilbert Romo appointed as Chief Revenue Officer at Kane Infrastructure Services to drive growth and add value to clients.
news.summary: Kane Infrastructure Services, a digital infrastructure solutions provider, has named Gilbert Romo as its new chief revenue officer. Romo, with over 30 years of experience in the tech infrastructure sector, will oversee commercial functions at Kane, aiming to boost strategic growth and enhance client value. Prior to this role, Romo served as the executive vice president at IES Communications. This move signifies Kane's commitment to advancing under Romo's leadership towards growth and client satisfaction.

news.headline: Three large-cap stocks under $10 with dividend yields over 2%: Nokia ($3.795, $20.91B cap, 3.40%), Ericsson, Sirius XM.
news.summary: Investors looking for value, stability, and income might find dividend-yielding large-cap stocks priced under $10 appealing. These stocks boast substantial market capitalizations and offer attractive dividend yields, making them a good choice for both income-focused and value-oriented investors. Nokia Oyj (NYSE:NOK)- Price: $3.795- Market Cap: $20.91 billion- Dividend Yield: 3.40%Nokia, a global leader in telecommunications, fits the bill for investors seeking reliable dividends and significant market capitalization.

news.headline: Zealand Pharma's total shares and voting rights as of June 28, 2024, exceeded 76 million.
Trump vows to revamp Biden's crypto regulations for America's future at Wisconsin event, aiming to secure crypto innovation domestically.
news.summary: At a campaign event in Wisconsin, former President Donald Trump pledged to dismantle President Joe Biden's regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies, emphasizing his commitment to bringing the future of digital currencies back to the United States. Trump received enthusiastic applause as he stated, "We will ensure that the future of crypto and the future of Bitcoin will be made in America. Otherwise, other countries are going to have it." This announcement comes amidst a push to secure America's future and create opportunities for young people, with Trump specifically targeting Biden's approach towards crypto policies. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: In the last day, the price of Solana (CRYPTO: SOL) has dropped by 4.03% to $141.70, which is a contrast to its recent week-long trend of a 8.0% increase, rising from $132.75 up to its current value. This recent fluctuation in price highlights the volatility experienced by Solana in the crypto market.
